name: wp-agent-skills
description: AI agent skills for managing a WordPress personal site — install, FSE theme setup, page building, media, SEO, security hardening, and health checks.

plugins.name: wp-agent-skills
plugins.description: A complete skill package for AI-managed WordPress sites. Covers the full lifecycle: install → theme → patterns → pages → media → SEO → security → QA. Built for Full Site Editing (FSE) with GSAP animations and cross-OS support (Windows/macOS/Linux).
